meaning: n.(大学一年级男生或儿童等戴的)无檐小便帽
examples: The icon on this tab is a beanie.
Beanie Babies were lots of fun; they came with their own tags containing theirname, birthday, and a poem.
The most popular Happy Meal toy ever was when McDonald's gave out more than 100 million Teenie Beanie Babies.
Loughner said he was feeling hot, so the deputy removed Loughner's beanie and hooded sweatshirt.
He was wearing a black beanie, a black hoodie-type sweatshirt, khaki pants and Sketchers shoes.
